context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Reconstruction verified. Key changes: (1) AuditLogPage queries governance_events from Supabase, shows null state if table missing. (2) ReportsPage gates financial snapshot behind accounting integration, executive memo behind governance events. (3) PDF route at /api/reports/generate-pdf creates deterministic PDF. (4) Scrape engine extracts ONLY structured metadata - no LLM enrichment. (5) All synthetic strings purged from frontend. (6) SQL migration 021_trust_reconstruction.sql ready for deployment. Tables need to be created in Supabase before full integration testing.
